title: Leo Woodall Joins a New Lord of the Rings Movie
summary: A new Lord of the Rings movie called The Hunt for Gollum is coming out next year. Warner Bros announced the cast at a big movie event. Leo Woodall, who was in One Day, is joining the movie. He will play a character named Halvard. Other new actors include Jamie Dornan as Strider and Kate Winslet as Marigol. Some favorite actors from the old movies are coming back too, like Ian McKellen as Gandalf, Elijah Wood as Frodo, and Andy Serkis as Gollum. The story happens between The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings and follows Aragorn looking for Gollum to keep a ring safe from Sauron. This is exciting news for fans of the fantasy world.

background_read: The Lord of the Rings is a popular fantasy series with movies about adventures in a world called Middle-earth. It has heroes like Aragorn and characters like Gollum who are important to the story. New movies sometimes add actors to tell more stories from this world.
Article_Structure: WHO: Leo Woodall, Jamie Dornan, Kate Winslet, and returning actors like Ian McKellen
WHAT: A new Lord of the Rings movie called The Hunt for Gollum with a cast announcement
WHERE: Announced at CinemaCon, an event for movie studios
WHY: To share news about the upcoming movie and introduce new actors to the fantasy world

perspectives.description: Fans are happy to see new actors and old favorites in a new movie.
